item.text: {"case_id":"brake-loaded-action-a1-tree-maintenance","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Both turns activate the anti-spiral brake: the first sentence refuses the requested new intake item, the body identifies the repeated symptom-by-symptom classification mechanism, and it redirects to upstream intake-model consolidation.
